inputs.label: Annual Property Tax
inputs.businessContext: The total property tax for the full year as assessed by the local government.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total property tax for the full year as assessed by the local government.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yerel yönetim tarafından değerlendirilen tam yıl için toplam emlak vergisi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die gesamte Grundsteuer für das volle Jahr, wie von der lokalen Regierung festgesetzt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le montant total de la taxe foncière pour l'année complète tel qu'évalué par le gouvernement local.
businessContext_i18n.es: El impuesto predial total para el año completo según lo evaluado por el gobierno local.

inputs.label: Days in Tax Year
inputs.businessContext: The number of days in the tax year (typically 365, or 366 for a leap year).

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of days in the tax year (typically 365, or 366 for a leap year).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergi yılındaki gün sayısı (genellikle 365 veya artık yıl için 366).
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Anzahl der Tage im Steuerjahr (typischerweise 365 oder 366 in einem Schaltjahr).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le nombre de jours dans l'année fiscale (généralement 365, ou 366 pour une année bissextile).
businessContext_i18n.es: El número de días en el año fiscal (típicamente 365, o 366 para un año bisiesto).

inputs.label: Days Owned
inputs.businessContext: Number of days the property was owned during the tax year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of days the property was owned during the tax year.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergi yılı boyunca mülkün sahip olunduğu gün sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Tage, an denen die Immobilie während des Steuerjahres im Besitz war.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de jours pendant lesquels la propriété a été possédée au cours de l'année fiscale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de días que la propiedad fue poseída durante el año fiscal.

inputs.label: Other Fees
inputs.businessContext: Any additional fees or adjustments (e.g., closing costs, penalties, credits).

businessContext_i18n.en: Any additional fees or adjustments (e.g., closing costs, penalties, credits).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ek ücretler veya düzeltmeler (örneğin, kapanış maliyetleri, cezalar, krediler).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Gebühren oder Anpassungen (z. B. Abschlusskosten, Strafen, Gutschriften).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tous frais ou ajustements supplémentaires (par exemple, frais de clôture, pénalités, crédits).
businessContext_i18n.es: Cualquier tarifa o ajuste adicional (por ejemplo, costos de cierre, multas, créditos).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
